articles.title: Hull could face points deduction in Premier League
articles.summary: Winning the play-off final means Hull must sell players before the end of the month to avoid a potential points deduction in the Premier League.

articles.title: Real Madrid sign Silva on free transfer
articles.summary: Bernado Silva, who left Manchester City at the end of the season, links up with new Real Madrid manager Jose Mourinho.

articles.title: No stage too big - Haaland arrives in style at World Cup
articles.summary: Erling Haaland has made a habit of scoring debut goals in the big competitions. He did it in the Champions League, the Bundesliga and the Premier League. Now he has done it at the World Cup too.

articles.title: Emotional Messi explains tears after Argentina goal
articles.summary: Lionel Messi was brought to tears after scoring the opening goal in Argentina's 3-0 win against Algeria because of a matter "completely unrelated to football".

articles.title: Who would you start against Croatia? Pick your England XI
articles.summary: As Thomas Tuchel's England side prepare for their opening game against Croatia, who would you pick to start the first match in Dallas?

articles.title: Hearts, Hibs and Motherwell learn European opponents
articles.summary: Heart of Midlothian will face Sturm Graz in the second round of Champions League qualifying as Hibernian and Motherwell learn their Conference League opponents.

articles.title: How Modric and Croatia continue to defy the odds
articles.summary: The child displaced by war who won six Champions League titles and a Ballon d'Or - how Luka Modric and England's opponents Croatia continue to defy the odds.

articles.title: Real Madrid sign Bernardo Silva
articles.summary: Real Madrid have signed former Manchester City midfielder Bernardo Silva on a free transfer.

articles.title: 'Magnifique!' All the angles of Mbappe's long-range strike
articles.summary: Watch all the angles of Kylian Mbappe's second goal in France's 3-1 win over Senegal.

articles.title: 'Huge goal!' - Araujo equalises for Uruguay against Saudi Arabia
articles.summary: Maxi Araujo equalises in the 80th minute for Uruguay against Saudi Arabia at the Miami Stadium in their Group H encounter.

articles.title: 'Sensational!' - Wood and Just combine twice for New Zealand goals
articles.summary: Chris Wood and Elijah Just combine for two 'sensational' goals for New Zealand during their Group G match with Iran at the Los Angeles Stadium.

articles.title: Nijman beats Searle to claim sixth Players Championship title of season
articles.summary: Wessel Nijman maintained his remarkable record against Ryan Searle to clinch an extraordinary sixth Players Championship title of the season on Tuesday.

articles.title: 'Magnificent' - Messi scores hat-trick to equal Klose scoring record
articles.summary: Lionel Messi scores a hat-trick to reach 16 World Cup goals, equalling Miroslav Klose's record.

articles.title: Highlights: Haaland scores twice in Norway win over Iraq
articles.summary: Erling Haland scores two goals as Norway begin their World Cup 2026 campaign with a 4-1 win against Iraq.

articles.title: 'Dear, oh dear!' - Huge goalkeeping shocker gives Haaland a second goal
articles.summary: Erling Haaland will not have a easier goal at this World Cup as the Iraq goalkeeper  Jalal Hassan is caught out by the Norway striker.

articles.title: 'Very, very special' - Mbappe scores twice to break France goals record
articles.summary: Kylian Mbappe scores twice for France in their opening World Cup game against Senegal to become Les Bleus' all-time leading goalscorer.

articles.title: Lack of World Cup segregation a risk - fans' chief
articles.summary: The head of fan group Football Supporters Europe says a lack of fan segregation at the 2026 World Cup shows Fifa has "lost control of their ticketing".

articles.title: India: Why country of 1.4 billion is not at World Cup
articles.summary: The world's most populous country is still missing from football's biggest stage.

articles.title: Lukaku makes impact off the bench as Belgium draw with Egypt
articles.summary: An own goal from Mohamed Hany denies Egypt a first ever victory at the World Cup as they draw 1-1 with Belgium at the Seattle Stadium.

articles.title: Vozinha heroics help Cape Verde hold Spain to goalless draw
